title: crotalaria duboisii
intro: Crotalaria duboisii, also known as the 'Horsefly weed', is a plant species within the legume family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria duboisii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
